name: McGuire AFB
profile: Military-friendly McGuire AFB housing snapshot anchored to Burlington County / Joint Base MDL, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: Steady demand with limited local inventory.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 New Jersey VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near McGuire.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; higher monthly costs due to significant NJ property taxes

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_trenton_burlington: Wrightstown is safe; safety in the metro area varies. Medford and Marlton are preferred safe alternatives for families.

school_quality.on_base: None; residents attend North Hanover Township Schools.
school_quality.off_base: Northern Burlington County Regional and Medford schools are highly rated.

rental_vacancy.notes: Tight rental market due to proximity to NYC and Philadelphia corridors.

rental_metrics.notes: Tight rental market due to proximity to NYC and Philadelphia corridors.

special_events: Power in the Pines Air Show

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Massive tri-service mission (MDL); heavy community investment and high operational visibility.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: High property taxes in NJ are the primary hurdle for buyers; resale value is historically strong.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Mount Laurel and Medford offer premium long-term stability.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Steady demand from NYC/Philly commuters keeps prices resilient; inventory remains low.

summary_points: Joint Base McGuire-Dix-Lakehurst sits in the Burlington County / Joint Base MDL housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 4.1% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
High property taxes in NJ are the primary hurdle for buyers; resale value is historically strong.
Neighborhood quality varies across Wrightstown, Mount Holly, Columbus and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Steady demand from NYC/Philly commuters keeps prices resilient; inventory remains low.
opportunities: McGuire military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Wrightstown and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near McGuire.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Burlington County / Joint Base MDL market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: McGuire buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Mount Laurel and Medford offer premium long-term stability.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near McGuire can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to McGuire.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near McGuire.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

market.market_type_summary: Steady demand with limited local inventory.

base_profile.host_or_major_command: 305th Air Mobility Wing / Air Mobility Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: McGuire AFB is part of Joint Base McGuire-Dix-Lakehurst, supporting air mobility, tri-service operations, and high-demand housing across the Philadelphia and New Jersey corridor.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Massive tri-service mission (MDL); heavy community investment and high operational visibility.
base_profile.base_bluf: Steady demand from NYC/Philly commuters keeps prices resilient; inventory remains low.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near McGuire.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Wrightstown.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for McGuire clients — not generic Burlington County / Joint Base MDL stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near McGuire is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: McGuire housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for McGuire, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to McGuire should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.

medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Burlington County / Joint Base MDL metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.

Drive the commute from target neighborhoods during expected report time.
Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This McGuire AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Burlington County / Joint Base MDL is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
